mapper.select: SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME, E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGR_ENAME, D.DNAME, S.GRADE FROM EMP E1 INNER JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO INNER JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL INNER JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E1 INNER JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO INNER JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL INNER JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO
